rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 1/10 and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: missing native-level Japanese proficiency, no embedded/networking firmware experience, and minimal/dated C/C++ versus a web-tech background. The reworded justification and reordered strengths/concerns are ordinary run-to-run phrasing noise, not substantive shifts. Nothing in the variant keys off the Berlin-to-São Paulo location change.
